2605.02829.title: Compress Then Adapt? No, Do It Together via Task-aware Union of Subspaces
2605.02829.paper_summary: Adapting large pretrained models to diverse tasks is now routine, yet the two dominant strategies of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) and low-rank compression are typically composed in sequence. This decoupled practice first compresses and then fine-tunes adapters, potentially misaligning the compressed subspace with downstream objectives and squandering a global parameter budget. To overcome this limitation, we introduce JACTUS (Joint Adaptation and Compression with a Task-aware Union of Subspaces), a single framework that unifies compression and adaptation. From a small calibration set, JACTUS estimates input and pre-activation gradient covariances, forms their orthogonal union with the pretrained weight subspace, performs a projected low-rank approximation inside this union, allocates rank globally by marginal gain per parameter, and trains only a compact core matrix. This explicitly mitigates the potential misalignment between the compressed subspace and downstream objectives by coupling the directions preserved for compression with those required for adaptation, yielding a deployable low-rank model that avoids retaining full frozen weights while enabling fast and robust tuning. On vision, JACTUS attains an average 89.2% accuracy on ViT-Base across eight datasets at 80% retained parameters, surpassing strong 100% PEFT baselines (e.g., DoRA 87.9%). On language, JACTUS achieves an 80.9% average on Llama2-7B commonsense QA at the same 80% retained-parameter budget, outperforming 100% PEFT (e.g., DoRA 79.7%) and exceeding prior compress-then-finetune pipelines under the same ratained-parameter budget. We will release code.
2605.02829.paper_summary_zh: 適應大型預訓練模型以應對多樣化任務現在已成為常規，然而，兩種主流的參數高效微調（PEFT）和低秩壓縮策略通常是按順序組合的。這種解耦的做法首先進行壓縮，然後微調適配器，這可能會使壓縮的子空間與下游目標不一致，並浪費全局參數預算。為了克服這一限制，我們引入了JACTUS（聯合適應與壓縮的任務感知子空間聯合），這是一個統一壓縮和適應的單一框架。JACTUS從一個小的校準集估計輸入和預激活梯度的協方差，形成它們與預訓練權重子空間的正交聯合，在這個聯合內執行投影低秩近似，通過每個參數的邊際增益全局分配秩，並僅訓練一個緊湊的核心矩陣。這明確減輕了壓縮子空間與下游目標之間的潛在不一致性，通過將為壓縮保留的方向與適應所需的方向耦合，產生了一個可部署的低秩模型，避免保留完整的凍結權重，同時實現快速和穩健的調整。在視覺任務上，JACTUS在八個數據集上對ViT-Base達到了平均89.2%的準確率，保留80%的參數，超越了強大的100% PEFT基準（例如，DoRA 87.9%）。在語言任務上，JACTUS在相同80%保留參數預算下，對Llama2-7B常識QA達到了80.9%的平均準確率，優於100% PEFT（例如，DoRA 79.7%），並在相同的保留參數預算下超越了之前的壓縮再微調管道。我們將發布代碼。
2605.02829.author: Jingze Ge et.al.
2605.02829.authors: Jingze Ge, Yun Liu, Xue Geng, Wanqi Dong, Wang Zhe Mark, Min Wu, Xulei Yang
